<content>1: # AgentCube Implementation Plan (AR-023 to AR-033)
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: This plan maps Architectural Requirements AR-023 through AR-033 to specific files and implementation logic. These ARs represent extensions including CI/CD enhancements, idle cleanup controller, Python SDK, integrations, and platform enhancements.
6: 
7: ---
8: 
9: ## AR Mapping
10: 
11: | AR | Proposed Extension | Description |
12: |----|---------------------|--------------|
13: | AR-023 | CI/CD Enhancements | Extended GitHub Actions workflows, artifact management |
14: | AR-024 | Idle Cleanup (Agentd) | Controller for automatic sandbox cleanup on idle |
15: | AR-025 | Session Store Enhancements | Advanced session management, TTL, persistence |
16: | AR-026 | Sandbox Orchestration Extensions | Warm pools, templates, scaling policies |
17: | AR-027 | Session Routing Extensions | Advanced routing, load balancing, failover |
18: | AR-028 | Python SDK | Complete client library for Code Interpreter and AgentRuntime |
19: | AR-029 | Integration APIs | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer, external integrations |
20: | AR-030 | Deployment Extensions | Helm chart enhancements, multi-environment support |
21: | AR-031 | Code Execution Extensions | Advanced PicoD features, workspace management |
22: | AR-032 | Multi-environment Support | Dev/Staging/Prod environments, configuration management |
23: | AR-033 | Advanced CLI Extensions | Enhanced CLI features, interactive mode, plugin system |
24: 
25: ---
26: 
27: ## AR-023: CI/CD Enhancements
28: 
29: ### Package
30: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/.github/workflows`
31: 
32: ### Files to Create
33: 
34: #### 1. `.github/workflows/agentcube-ci.yml`
35: ```yaml
36: name: AgentCube CI
37: on:
38:   pull_request:
39:     branches: [main, 'release-*']
40:   push:
41:     branches: [main, 'release-*']
42: ```
43: - Path-filtered workflow triggers
44: - Docker build verification
45: - Go/Python lint on path changes
46: - Code generation checks
47: - Test coverage reporting
48: 
49: #### 2. `.github/workflows/agentcube-release.yml`
50: ```yaml
51: name: Release
52: on:
53:   push:
54:     tags: ['v*']
55: ```
56: - Multi-architecture Docker builds
57: - Image push to GHCR
58: - Semantic version handling
59: 
60: #### 3. `.github/workflows/agentcube-e2e.yml`
61: - Kind cluster setup
62: - E2E test execution
63: - Artifact collection on failure
64: 
65: #### 4. `.github/workflows/agentcube-codegen.yml`
66: - API code generation verification
67: - Copyright header checks
68: - Makefile consistency checks
69: 
70: ### Logic Flow
71: 1. Trigger on PR/push events
72: 2. Filter paths to determine jobs
73: 3. Run build/lint/test/e2e jobs in parallel
74: 4. Upload artifacts on failure
75: 5. Publish images on tags
76: 
77: ---
78: 
79: ## AR-024: Idle Cleanup (Agentd)
80: 
81: ### Package
82: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/cmd/agentd`
83: 
84: ### Files to Create
85: 
86: #### 1. `cmd/agentd/main.go`
87: ```go
88: package main
89: 
90: import (
91:     "os"
92:     "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client/config"
93:     "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/manager"
94:     "sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox/api/v1alpha1"
95:     "github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/idlecleanup"
96: )
97: 
98: func main() {
99:     mgr, _ := manager.New(config.GetConfigOrDie(), manager.Options{
100:         Scheme: scheme,
101:         Metrics: server.Options{BindAddress: "0"},
102:         HealthProbeBindAddress: "0",
103:     })
104:     mgr.Add(idlecleanup.NewReconciler(mgr.GetClient()))
105:     mgr.Start(ctrl.SetupSignalHandler())
106: }
107: ```
108: 
109: #### 2. `pkg/idlecleanup/reconciler.go`
110: ```go
111: type Reconciler struct {
112:     client client.Client
113:     log    logr.Logger
114: }
115: 
116: const SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 * time.Minute
117: const LastActivityAnnotationKey = "last-activity-time"
118: 
119: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {
120:     // 1. Get Sandbox object
121:     // 2. Read last-activity-time annotation
122:     // 3. Parse RFC3339 timestamp
123:     // 4. Check if expired (now > lastActivity + 15min)
124:     // 5. Delete if expired, requeue if not yet expired
125: }
126: ```
127: 
128: #### 3. `pkg/idlecleanup/types.go`
129: ```go
130: type Config struct {
131:     ExpirationTimeout time.Duration
132:     RequeueInterval   time.Duration
133: }
134: ```
135: 
136: ### Logic Flow
137: 1. Watch Sandbox CRD changes
138: 2. Extract `last-activity-time` annotation
139: 3. Calculate expiration time (lastActivity + 15min)
140: 4. If expired: delete sandbox, return success
141: 5. If not expired: requeue until expiration
142: 6. Handle NotFound gracefully (idempotent delete)
143: 
144: ---

146: ## AR-025: Session Store Enhancements
147: 
148: ### Package
149: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store`
150: 
151: ### Files to Create
152: 
153: #### 1. `pkg/store/session_store.go`
154: ```go
155: type SessionStore interface {
156:     CreateSession(ctx context.Context, session *Session) error
157:     GetSession(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*Session, error)
158:     UpdateSession(ctx context.Context, session *Session) error
159:     DeleteSession(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
160:     ListSessions(ctx context.Context, namespace string) ([]*Session, error)
161:     UpdateLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, time time.Time) error
162: }
163: ```
164: 
165: #### 2. `pkg/store/redis/redis_session.go`
166: ```go
167: type RedisSessionStore struct {
168:     client *redis.Client
169:     ttl    time.Duration
170: }
171: 
172: func (r *RedisSessionStore) CreateSession(ctx context.Context, session *Session) error {
173:     key := fmt.Sprintf("session:%s", session.ID)
174:     data, _ := json.Marshal(session)
175:     return r.client.Set(ctx, key, data, r.ttl).Err()
176: }
177: 
178: func (r *RedisSessionStore) UpdateLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, t time.Time) error {
179:     key := fmt.Sprintf("session:%s", sessionID)
180:     return r.client.HSet(ctx, key, "last_activity_time", t.Format(time.RFC3339)).Err()
181: }
182: ```
183: 
184: #### 3. `pkg/store/session.go`
185: ```go
186: type Session struct {
187:     ID            string            `json:"session_id"`
188:     Namespace     string            `json:"namespace"`
189:     Name          string            `json:"name"`
190:     Kind          string            `json:"kind"`
191:     SandboxID     string            `json:"sandbox_id"`
192:     EntryPoints   []EntryPoint     `json:"entry_points"`
193:     CreatedAt     time.Time         `json:"created_at"`
194:     LastActivity  time.Time         `json:"last_activity_time"`
195:     ExpiresAt     time.Time         `json:"expires_at"`
196:     Metadata      map[string]string `json:"metadata"`
197: }
198: ```
199: 
200: #### 4. `pkg/store/metrics.go`
201: ```go
202: type StoreMetrics struct {
203:     sessionsActive   prometheus.Gauge
204:     sessionsCreated  prometheus.Counter
205:     sessionsDeleted   prometheus.Counter
206:     operationLatency *prometheus.HistogramVec
207: }
208: ```
209: 
210: ### Logic Flow
211: 1. Initialize Redis/Valkey connection
212: 2. Implement CRUD operations for sessions
213: 3. Add TTL-based expiration
214: 4. Track last activity for idle detection
215: 5. Expose Prometheus metrics

1072: )

1074: type Store interface {

1077:     StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, info *types.SandboxInfo) error

1097: ## AR-035: Redis Provider Implementation
1098: 
1099: **Source:** `specs/session-store/spec.md` - Requirements 2-14
1100: 
1101: ### Package
1102: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store`
1103: 
1104: ### Files to Create
1105: 
1106: #### 1. `pkg/store/redis.go`
1107: 
1108: ```go
1109: package store
1110: 
1111: import (
1112:     "context"
1113:     "encoding/json"
1114:     "fmt"
1115:     "time"
1116: 
1117:     "github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
1118:     "github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
1119: )
1120: 
1121: const (
1122:     sessionKeyPrefix    = "session:"
1123:     expirySortedSet     = "session:expiry"
1124:     lastActivitySortedSet = "session:last_activity"
1125: )
1126: 
1127: type RedisStore struct {
1128:     client *redis.Client
1129: }
1130: 
1131: func NewRedisStore(addr, password string, passwordRequired bool) (*RedisStore, error) {
1132:     if passwordRequired && password == "" {
1133:         return nil, fmt.Errorf("REDIS_PASSWORD is required")
1134:     }
1135:     
1136:     client := redis.NewClient(&redis.Options{
1137:         Addr:     addr,
1138:         Password: password,
1139:     })
1140:     
1141:     return &RedisStore{client: client}, nil
1142: }
1143: 
1144: func (r *RedisStore) Ping(ctx context.Context) error {
1145:     result, err := r.client.Ping(ctx).Result()
1146:     if err != nil {
1147:         return err
1148:     }
1149:     if result != "PONG" {
1150:         return fmt.Errorf("unexpected PING response: %s", result)
1151:     }
1152:     return nil
1153: }
1154: 
1155: func (r *RedisStore) GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
1156:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + sessionID
1157:     data, err := r.client.Get(ctx, key).Bytes()
1158:     if err == redis.Nil {
1159:         return nil, ErrNotFound
1160:     }
1161:     if err != nil {
1162:         return nil, err
1163:     }
1164:     
1165:     var info types.SandboxInfo
1166:     if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &info); err != nil {
1167:         return nil, err
1168:     }
1169:     return &info, nil
1170: }
1171: 
1172: func (r *RedisStore) StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, info *types.SandboxInfo) error {
1173:     if info == nil || info.ExpiresAt.IsZero() {
1174:         return fmt.Errorf("sandbox is nil or ExpiresAt is zero")
1175:     }
1176:     
1177:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + info.SessionID
1178:     data, err := json.Marshal(info)
1179:     if err != nil {
1180:         return err
1181:     }
1182:     
1183:     now := time.Now()
1184:     expiryScore := float64(info.ExpiresAt.Unix())
1185:     activityScore := float64(now.Unix())
1186:     
1187:     _, err = r.client.TxPipelined(ctx, func(pipe redis.Pipeliner) error {
1188:         pipe.SetNX(ctx, key, data, time.Until(info.ExpiresAt))
1189:         pipe.ZAdd(ctx, expirySortedSet, redis.Z{Score: expiryScore, Member: info.SessionID})
1190:         pipe.ZAdd(ctx, lastActivitySortedSet, redis.Z{Score: activityScore, Member: info.SessionID})
1191:         return nil
1192:     })
1193:     return err
1194: }
1195: 
1196: func (r *RedisStore) UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, info *types.SandboxInfo) error {
1197:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + info.SessionID
1198:     data, err := json.Marshal(info)
1199:     if err != nil {
1200:         return err
1201:     }
1202:     
1203:     ok, err := r.client.SetXX(ctx, key, data, 0).Result()
1204:     if err != nil {
1205:         return err
1206:     }
1207:     if !ok {
1208:         return fmt.Errorf("key not exists")
1209:     }
1210:     return nil
1211: }
1212: 
1213: func (r *RedisStore) DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
1214:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + sessionID
1215:     
1216:     _, err := r.client.TxPipelined(ctx, func(pipe redis.Pipeliner) error {
1217:         pipe.Del(ctx, key)
1218:         pipe.ZRem(ctx, expirySortedSet, sessionID)
1219:         pipe.ZRem(ctx, lastActivitySortedSet, sessionID)
1220:         return nil
1221:     })
1222:     return err
1223: }
1224: 
1225: func (r *RedisStore) ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int) ([]string, error) {
1226:     if limit <= 0 {
1227:         return nil, nil
1228:     }
1229:     
1230:     result, err := r.client.ZRangeByScore(ctx, expirySortedSet, &redis.ZRangeBy{
1231:         Min:    "-inf",
1232:         Max:    fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix()),
1233:         Offset: 0,
1234:         Count:  int64(limit),
1235:     }).Result()
1236:     return result, err
1237: }
1238: 
1239: func (r *RedisStore) ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int) ([]string, error) {
1240:     if limit <= 0 {
1241:         return nil, nil
1242:     }
1243:     
1244:     result, err := r.client.ZRangeByScore(ctx, lastActivitySortedSet, &redis.ZRangeBy{
1245:         Min:    "-inf",
1246:         Max:    fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix()),
1247:         Offset: 0,
1248:         Count:  int64(limit),
1249:     }).Result()
1250:     return result, err
1251: }
1252: 
1253: func (r *RedisStore) UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error {
1254:     if sessionID == "" {
1255:         return fmt.Errorf("session id is empty")
1256:     }
1257:     
1258:     if at.IsZero() {
1259:         at = time.Now()
1260:     }
1261:     
1262:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + sessionID
1263:     exists, err := r.client.Exists(ctx, key).Result()
1264:     if err != nil {
1265:         return err
1266:     }
1267:     if exists == 0 {
1268:         return ErrNotFound
1269:     }
1270:     
1271:     score := float64(at.Unix())
1272:     return r.client.ZAdd(ctx, lastActivitySortedSet, redis.Z{Score: score, Member: sessionID}).Err()
1273: }
1274: 
1275: func (r *RedisStore) Close() error {
1276:     return r.client.Close()
1277: }
1278: ```
1279: 
1280: #### 2. `pkg/store/redis_test.go`
1281: 
1282: Unit tests covering all Redis store methods with mock Redis or testcontainers.
1283: 
1284: ### Logic Flow
1285: 1. Connect to Redis using REDIS_ADDR and REDIS_PASSWORD
1286: 2. Implement all Store interface methods
1287: 3. Use Redis transactions (TxPipelined) for atomic operations
1288: 4. Maintain two sorted sets: expiry and last_activity
1289: 5. Return ErrNotFound on missing keys
1290: 6. Handle password requirement based on REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED
1291:

1306: package store

1313: 
1314:     "github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go"
1315:     "github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
1316: )
1317: 
1318: type ValkeyStore struct {
1319:     client valkey.Client
1320: }
1321: 
1322: func NewValkeyStore(addrs []string, password string, passwordRequired, disableCache, forceSingle bool) (*ValkeyStore, error) {
1323:     if passwordRequired && password == "" {
1324:         return nil, fmt.Errorf("VALKEY_PASSWORD is required")
1325:     }
1326:     
1327:     client, err := valkey.NewClient(valkey.ClientOption{
1328:         InitAddress:         addrs,
1329:         Password:            password,
1330:         DisableCache:        disableCache,
1331:         ForceSingleClient:   forceSingle,
1332:     })
1333:     if err != nil {
1334:         return nil, err
1335:     }
1336:     
1337:     return &ValkeyStore{client: client}, nil
1338: }
1339: 
1340: func isValkeyNil(err error) bool {
1341:     return err == valkey.Nil
1342: }
1343: 
1344: func (v *ValkeyStore) Ping(ctx context.Context) error {
1345:     result, err := v.client.Do(ctx, "PING").ToString()
1346:     if err != nil {
1347:         return err
1348:     }
1349:     if result != "PONG" {
1350:         return fmt.Errorf("unexpected PING response: %s", result)
1351:     }
1352:     return nil
1353: }
1354: 
1355: func (v *ValkeyStore) GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
1356:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + sessionID
1357:     data, err := v.client.Get(ctx, key).Bytes()
1358:     if isValkeyNil(err) {
1359:         return nil, ErrNotFound
1360:     }
1361:     if err != nil {
1362:         return nil, err
1363:     }
1364:     
1365:     var info types.SandboxInfo
1366:     if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &info); err != nil {
1367:         return nil, err
1368:     }
1369:     return &info, nil
1370: }
1371: 
1372: func (v *ValkeyStore) StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, info *types.SandboxInfo) error {
1373:     if info == nil || info.ExpiresAt.IsZero() {
1374:         return fmt.Errorf("sandbox is nil or ExpiresAt is zero")
1375:     }
1376:     
1377:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + info.SessionID
1378:     data, err := json.Marshal(info)
1379:     if err != nil {
1380:         return err
1381:     }
1382:     
1383:     now := time.Now()
1384:     expiryScore := float64(info.ExpiresAt.Unix())
1385:     activityScore := float64(now.Unix())
1386:     
1387:     err = v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd(
1388:         "MULTI",
1389:     )).Err()
1390:     if err != nil {
1391:         return err
1392:     }
1393:     
1394:     _, err = v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd(
1395:         "SET", key, data, "EX", fmt.Sprintf("%d", int64(time.Until(info.ExpiresAt).Seconds())),
1396:     )).Result()
1397:     if err != nil {
1398:         v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd("DISCARD")).Err()
1399:         return err
1400:     }
1401:     
1402:     _, err = v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd(
1403:         "ZADD", expirySortedSet, expiryScore, info.SessionID,
1404:     )).Result()
1405:     if err != nil {
1406:         v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd("DISCARD")).Err()
1407:         return err
1408:     }
1409:     
1410:     _, err = v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd(
1411:         "ZADD", lastActivitySortedSet, activityScore, info.SessionID,
1412:     )).Result()
1413:     if err != nil {
1414:         v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd("DISCARD")).Err()
1415:         return err
1416:     }
1417:     
1418:     _, err = v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd("EXEC")).Result()
1419:     return err
1420: }
1421: 
1422: func (v *ValkeyStore) UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, info *types.SandboxInfo) error {
1423:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + info.SessionID
1424:     data, err := json.Marshal(info)
1425:     if err != nil {
1426:         return err
1427:     }
1428:     
1429:     result, err := v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd(
1430:         "SET", key, data, "XX",
1431:     )).Result()
1432:     if err != nil {
1433:         return err
1434:     }
1435:     if result == "" {
1436:         return fmt.Errorf("key not exists")
1437:     }
1438:     return nil
1439: }
1440: 
1441: func (v *ValkeyStore) DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
1442:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + sessionID
1443:     
1444:     err := v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd(
1445:         "DEL", key,
1446:     )).Err()
1447:     if err != nil {
1448:         return err
1449:     }
1450:     
1451:     err = v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd(
1452:         "ZREM", expirySortedSet, sessionID,
1453:     )).Err()
1454:     if err != nil {
1455:         return err
1456:     }
1457:     
1458:     return v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd(
1459:         "ZREM", lastActivitySortedSet, sessionID,
1460:     )).Err()
1461: }
1462: 
1463: func (v *ValkeyStore) ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int) ([]string, error) {
1464:     if limit <= 0 {
1465:         return nil, nil
1466:     }
1467:     
1468:     result, err := v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd(
1469:         "ZRANGEBYSCORE", expirySortedSet, "-inf", fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix()),
1470:         "LIMIT", "0", fmt.Sprintf("%d", limit),
1471:     )).ToStringSlice()
1472:     return result, err
1473: }
1474: 
1475: func (v *ValkeyStore) ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int) ([]string, error) {
1476:     if limit <= 0 {
1477:         return nil, nil
1478:     }
1479:     
1480:     result, err := v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd(
1481:         "ZRANGEBYSCORE", lastActivitySortedSet, "-inf", fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix()),
1482:         "LIMIT", "0", fmt.Sprintf("%d", limit),
1483:     )).ToStringSlice()
1484:     return result, err
1485: }
1486: 
1487: func (v *ValkeyStore) UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error {
1488:     if sessionID == "" {
1489:         return fmt.Errorf("session id is empty")
1490:     }
1491:     
1492:     if at.IsZero() {
1493:         at = time.Now()
1494:     }
1495:     
1496:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + sessionID
1497:     exists, err := v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd("EXISTS", key)).ToInt64()
1498:     if err != nil {
1499:         return err
1500:     }
1501:     if exists == 0 {
1502:         return ErrNotFound
1503:     }
1504:     
1505:     score := float64(at.Unix())
1506:     return v.client.Do(ctx, valkey.FlatCmd(
1507:         "ZADD", lastActivitySortedSet, score, sessionID,
1508:     )).Err()
1509: }
1510: 
1511: func (v *ValkeyStore) Close() error {
1512:     return v.client.Close()
1513: }
1514: ```
1515: 
1516: #### 2. `pkg/store/valkey_test.go`
1517: 
1518: Unit tests covering all Valkey store methods.
1519: 
1520: ### Logic Flow
1521: 1. Connect to Valkey using VALKEY_ADDR (comma-separated)
1522: 2. Implement all Store interface methods
1523: 3. Use Valkey commands for atomic operations
1524: 4. Handle Valkey-specific Nil error checking
1525: 5. Support optional flags: VALKEY_DISABLE_CACHE, VALKEY_FORCE_SINGLE

1529: ## AR-037: Storage Singleton and Provider Selection
1530: 
1531: **Source:** `specs/session-store/spec.md` - Requirements 11, 14
1532: 
1533: ### Package
1534: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store`
1535: 
1536: ### Files to Create
1537: 
1538: #### 1. `pkg/store/storage.go`
1539: 
1540: ```go
1541: package store
1542: 
1543: import (
1544:     "context"
1545:     "fmt"
1546:     "os"
1547:     "strings"
1548:     "sync"
1549:     "time"
1550: 
1551:     "k8s.io/klog/v2"
1552: )
1553: 
1554: var (
1555:     globalStore     Store
1556:     storeInitOnce   sync.Once
1557:     storeInitError  error
1558: )
1559: 
1560: func Storage() Store {
1561:     storeInitOnce.Do(func() {
1562:         globalStore, storeInitError = initStore()
1563:     })
1564:     if storeInitError != nil {
1565:         klog.Exitf("Failed to initialize store: %v", storeInitError)
1566:     }
1567:     return globalStore
1568: }
1569: 
1570: func initStore() (Store, error) {
1571:     storeType := strings.ToLower(os.Getenv("STORE_TYPE"))
1572:     if storeType == "" {
1573:         storeType = "redis"
1574:     }
1575:     
1576:     var s Store
1577:     var err error
1578:     
1579:     switch storeType {
1580:     case "redis":
1581:         s, err = initRedisStore()
1582:     case "valkey":
1583:         s, err = initValkeyStore()
1584:     default:
1585:         return nil, fmt.Errorf("unsupported STORE_TYPE: %s (supported: redis, valkey)", storeType)
1586:     }
1587:     
1588:     if err != nil {
1589:         return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to initialize %s store: %v", storeType, err)
1590:     }
1591:     
1592:     ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 5*time.Second)
1593:     defer cancel()
1594:     
1595:     if err := s.Ping(ctx); err != nil {
1596:         return nil, fmt.Errorf("store ping failed: %v", err)
1597:     }
1598:     
1599:     return s, nil
1600: }
1601: 
1602: func initRedisStore() (Store, error) {
1603:     addr := os.Getenv("REDIS_ADDR")
1604:     if addr == "" {
1605:         return nil, fmt.Errorf("REDIS_ADDR is required")
1606:     }
1607:     
1608:     password := os.Getenv("REDIS_PASSWORD")
1609:     passwordRequired := true
1610:     
1611:     if val := os.Getenv("REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED"); strings.ToLower(val) == "false" {
1612:         passwordRequired = false
1613:     }
1614:     
1615:     return NewRedisStore(addr, password, passwordRequired)
1616: }
1617: 
1618: func initValkeyStore() (Store, error) {
1619:     addrStr := os.Getenv("VALKEY_ADDR")
1620:     if addrStr == "" {
1621:         return nil, fmt.Errorf("VALKEY_ADDR is required")
1622:     }
1623:     
1624:     addrs := strings.Split(addrStr, ",")
1625:     for i := range addrs {
1626:         addrs[i] = strings.TrimSpace(addrs[i])
1627:     }
1628:     
1629:     password := os.Getenv("VALKEY_PASSWORD")
1630:     passwordRequired := true
1631:     
1632:     if val := os.Getenv("VALKEY_PASSWORD_REQUIRED"); strings.ToLower(val) == "false" {
1633:         passwordRequired = false
1634:     }
1635:     
1636:     disableCache := false
1637:     if val := os.Getenv("VALKEY_DISABLE_CACHE"); strings.ToLower(val) == "true" {
1638:         disableCache = true
1639:     }
1640:     
1641:     forceSingle := false
1642:     if val := os.Getenv("VALKEY_FORCE_SINGLE"); strings.ToLower(val) == "true" {
1643:         forceSingle = true
1644:     }
1645:     
1646:     return NewValkeyStore(addrs, password, passwordRequired, disableCache, forceSingle)
1647: }
1648: ```
1649: 
1650: ### Logic Flow
1651: 1. Use sync.Once for single initialization
1652: 2. Read STORE_TYPE env var (default: redis)
1653: 3. Validate store type (redis or valkey)
1654: 4. Initialize appropriate store based on environment
1655: 5. Validate connection with Ping
1656: 6. Log fatal on initialization failure
1657:

1660: ## AR-038: Session Manager - Session Resolution
1661: 
1662: **Source:** `specs/session-routing/spec.md` - Requirements 1-4
1663: 
1664: ### Package
1665: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/router`
1666: 
1667: ### Files to Create
1668: 
1669: #### 1. `pkg/router/session_manager.go`
1670: 
1671: ```go
1672: package router
1673: 
1674: import (
1675:     "context"
1676:     "encoding/json"
1677:     "fmt"
1678:     "io"
1679:     "net/http"
1680:     "os"
1681:     "time"
1682: 
1683:     "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
1684:     "github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store"
1685:     "github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
1686:     "k8s.io/klog/v2"
1687: )
1688: 
1689: const (
1690:     HeaderSessionID = "x-agentcube-session-id"
1691: )
1692: 
1693: type SessionManager interface {
1694:     GetSandboxBySession(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, namespace string, name string, kind string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
1695: }
1696: 
1697: type manager struct {
1698:     storeClient     store.Store
1699:     workloadMgrAddr string
1700:     httpClient      *http.Client
1701: }
1702: 
1703: type CreateSandboxRequest struct {
1704:     Kind      string `json:"kind"`
1705:     Name      string `json:"name"`
1706:     Namespace string `json:"namespace"`
1707: }
1708: 
1709: type CreateSandboxResponse struct {
1710:     SessionID   string        `json:"sessionId"`
1711:     SandboxID   string        `json:"sandboxId"`
1712:     SandboxName string        `json:"sandboxName"`
1713:     EntryPoints []EntryPoint  `json:"entryPoints"`
1714: }
1715: 
1716: type EntryPoint struct {
1717:     Path      string `json:"path"`
1718:     Protocol  string `json:"protocol"`
1719:     Endpoint  string `json:"endpoint"`
1720: }
1721: 
1722: func NewSessionManager(storeClient store.Store) (SessionManager, error) {
1723:     workloadMgrAddr := os.Getenv("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL")
1724:     if workloadMgrAddr == "" {
1725:         return nil, fmt.Errorf("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL environment variable is not set")
1726:     }
1727:     
1728:     transport := &http.Transport{
1729:         MaxIdleConnsPerHost: 100,
1730:         DisableCompression: false,
1731:     }
1732:     
1733:     httpClient := &http.Client{
1734:         Timeout:   2 * time.Minute,
1735:         Transport: transport,
1736:     }
1737:     
1738:     return &manager{
1739:         storeClient:     storeClient,
1740:         workloadMgrAddr: workloadMgrAddr,
1741:         httpClient:      httpClient,
1742:     }, nil
1743: }
1744: 
1745: func (m *manager) GetSandboxBySession(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, namespace string, name string, kind string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
1746:     if sessionID == "" {
1747:         return m.createSandbox(ctx, namespace, name, kind)
1748:     }
1749:     
1750:     info, err := m.storeClient.GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)
1751:     if err == store.ErrNotFound {
1752:         return nil, NewSessionNotFoundError(sessionID)
1753:     }
1754:     if err != nil {
1755:         return nil, err
1756:     }
1757:     
1758:     return info, nil
1759: }
1760: 
1761: func (m *manager) createSandbox(ctx context.Context, namespace string, name string, kind string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
1762:     endpoint := m.workloadMgrAddr
1763:     if kind == types.AgentRuntimeKind {
1764:         endpoint += "/v1/agent-runtime"
1765:     } else if kind == types.CodeInterpreterKind {
1766:         endpoint += "/v1/code-interpreter"
1767:     } else {
1768:         return nil, fmt.Errorf("unsupported kind: %s", kind)
1769:     }
1770:     
1771:     reqBody := CreateSandboxRequest{
1772:         Kind:      kind,
1773:         Name:      name,
1774:         Namespace: namespace,
1775:     }
1776:     
1777:     body, err := json.Marshal(reqBody)
1778:     if err != nil {
1779:         return nil, err
1780:     }
1781:     
1782:     req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, "POST", endpoint, bytes.NewBuffer(body))
1783:     if err != nil {
1784:         return nil, err
1785:     }
1786:     
1787:     req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
1788:     
1789:     if token := m.loadWorkloadManagerAuthToken(); token != "" {
1790:         req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+token)
1791:     }
1792:     
1793:     resp, err := m.httpClient.Do(req)
1794:     if err != nil {
1795:         return nil, err
1796:     }
1797:     defer resp.Body.Close()
1798:     
1799:     if resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {
1800:         if resp.StatusCode == http.StatusNotFound {
1801:             return nil, NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError(namespace, name, kind)
1802:         }
1803:         body, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
1804:         return nil, fmt.Errorf("workload manager returned status %d: %s", resp.StatusCode, string(body))
1805:     }
1806:     
1807:     var createResp CreateSandboxResponse
1808:     if err := json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&createResp); err != nil {
1809:         return nil, err
1810:     }
1811:     
1812:     if createResp.SessionID == "" {
1813:         return nil, fmt.Errorf("sessionId is empty in create response")
1814:     }
1815:     
1816:     info := &types.SandboxInfo{
1817:         SandboxID:   createResp.SandboxID,
1818:         Name:        createResp.SandboxName,
1819:         SessionID:   createResp.SessionID,
1820:         EntryPoints: convertEntryPoints(createResp.EntryPoints),
1821:     }
1822:     
1823:     return info, nil
1824: }
1825: 
1826: func (m *manager) loadWorkloadManagerAuthToken() string {
1827:     data, err := os.ReadFile("/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token")
1828:     if err != nil {
1829:         if !os.IsNotExist(err) {
1830:             klog.Warningf("Failed to read service account token: %v", err)
1831:         }
1832:         return ""
1833:     }
1834:     return string(bytes.TrimSpace(data))
1835: }
1836: 
1837: func convertEntryPoints(eps []EntryPoint) []types.EntryPoint {
1838:     result := make([]types.EntryPoint, len(eps))
1839:     for i, ep := range eps {
1840:         result[i] = types.EntryPoint{
1841:             Path:     ep.Path,
1842:             Protocol: ep.Protocol,
1843:             Endpoint: ep.Endpoint,
1844:         }
1845:     }
1846:     return result
1847: }
1848: ```

1902: 2. If empty, call workload manager to create sandbox

1910: ## AR-039: Reverse Proxy to Sandbox
1911: 
1912: **Source:** `specs/session-routing/spec.md` - Requirements 5-9
1913: 
1914: ### Package
1915: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/router`

1919: #### 1. `pkg/router/proxy.go`
1920: 
1921: ```go
1922: package router
1923: 
1924: import (
1925:     "fmt"
1926:     "net/http"
1927:     "net/http/httputil"
1928:     "strings"
1929:     "time"
1930: 
1931:     "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
1932:     "github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
1933:     "k8s.io/klog/v2"
1934: )
1935: 
1936: const (
1937:     TimeoutExitCode = 124
1938: )
1939: 
1940: type Proxy struct {
1941:     httpTransport  *http.Transport
1942:     jwtManager     *JWTManager
1943: }
1944: 
1945: func NewProxy() *Proxy {
1946:     return &Proxy{
1947:         httpTransport: &http.Transport{
1948:             IdleConnTimeout: 0,
1949:             DisableCompression: false,
1950:         },
1951:     }
1952: }
1953: 
1954: func (p *Proxy) ServeHTTP(c *gin.Context, info *types.SandboxInfo) {
1955:     targetURL := p.resolveUpstream(c.Request.URL.Path, info.EntryPoints)
1956:     if targetURL == nil {
1957:         c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "no entry point found for sandbox"})
1958:         return
1959:     }
1960:     
1961:     proxy := httputil.NewSingleHostReverseProxy(targetURL)
1962:     proxy.Transport = p.httpTransport
1963:     
1964:     var jwtToken string
1965:     if info.Kind == string(types.SandboxKind) || info.Kind == string(types.SandboxClaimKind) {
1966:         token, err := p.jwtManager.GenerateToken(map[string]interface{}{
1967:             "session_id": info.SessionID,
1968:             "sandbox_id": info.SandboxID,
1969:         })
1970:         if err != nil {
1971:             c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{
1972:                 "code":  "JWT_SIGNING_FAILED",
1973:                 "error": "failed to sign request",
1974:             })
1975:             return
1976:         }
1977:         jwtToken = token
1978:     }

# AgentCube Implementation Plan (AR-023 to AR-033)

## Overview

This plan maps Architectural Requirements AR-023 through AR-033 to specific files and implementation logic. These ARs represent extensions including CI/CD enhancements, idle cleanup controller, Python SDK, integrations, and platform enhancements.

---

## AR Mapping

| AR | Proposed Extension | Description |
|----|---------------------|--------------|
| AR-023 | CI/CD Enhancements | Extended GitHub Actions workflows, artifact management |
| AR-024 | Idle Cleanup (Agentd) | Controller for automatic sandbox cleanup on idle |
| AR-025 | Session Store Enhancements | Advanced session management, TTL, persistence |
| AR-026 | Sandbox Orchestration Extensions | Warm pools, templates, scaling policies |
| AR-027 | Session Routing Extensions | Advanced routing, load balancing, failover |
| AR-028 | Python SDK | Complete client library for Code Interpreter and AgentRuntime |
| AR-029 | Integration APIs | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer, external integrations |
| AR-030 | Deployment Extensions | Helm chart enhancements, multi-environment support |

2022: func (p *Proxy) resolveUpstream(reqPath string, entryPoints []types.EntryPoint) *url.URL {
2023:     for _, ep := range entryPoints {
2024:         if strings.HasPrefix(reqPath, ep.Path) {
2025:             return buildEndpointURL(ep)
2026:         }
2027:     }
2028:     
2029:     if len(entryPoints) > 0 {
2030:         return buildEndpointURL(entryPoints[0])
2031:     }
2032:     
2033:     return nil
2034: }
2035: 
2036: func buildEndpointURL(ep types.EntryPoint) *url.URL {
2037:     endpoint := ep.Endpoint
2038:     
2039:     protocol := strings.ToLower(ep.Protocol)
2040:     if protocol != "" && !strings.HasPrefix(endpoint, protocol+"://") && !strings.HasPrefix(endpoint, "http://") && !strings.HasPrefix(endpoint, "https://") {
2041:         endpoint = protocol + "://" + endpoint
2042:     }
2043:     
2044:     u, _ := url.Parse(endpoint)
2045:     return u
2046: }
2047: 
2048: func normalizePath(path string) string {
2049:     if path != "" && !strings.HasPrefix(path, "/") {
2050:         return "/" + path
2051:     }
2052:     return path
2053: }
2054: ```

2091: func NewJWTManager() (*JWTManager, error) {

2104:     now := time.Now()
2105:     
2106:     tokenClaims := jwt.MapClaims{
2107:         "exp": now.Add(jwtExpiration).Unix(),

2111:     
2112:     for k, v := range claims {

2121:     if j.clientset == nil {

2150:         Data: map[string][]byte{

2155:

2165:     
2166:     existing, err := j.clientset.CoreV1().Secrets(IdentityNamespace).Get(ctx, IdentitySecretName, metav1.GetOptions{})
2167:     if err != nil {

2171:     if privData, ok := existing.Data[PrivateKeyDataKey]; ok {
2172:         key, err := parsePrivateKey(privData)
2173:         if err != nil {

2185:         return ns

2538:     "time"
2539:

2552: type Reconciler struct {
2553:     client client.Client

2560: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req reconcile.Request) (reconcile.Result, error) {
2561:     sandbox := &v1alpha1.Sandbox{}
2562:     err := r.client.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox)
2563:     if err != nil {
2564:         if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
2565:             return reconcile.Result{}, nil
2566:         }
2567:         return reconcile.Result{}, err
2568:     }
2569:     
2570:     lastActivityStr, ok := sandbox.Annotations[LastActivityAnnotationKey]
2571:     if !ok || lastActivityStr == "" {
2572:         klog.Infof("Sandbox %s has no last-activity annotation, skipping", req.Name)
2573:         return reconcile.Result{}, nil
2574:     }
2575:     
2576:     lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
2577:     if err != nil {
2578:         klog.Errorf("Failed to parse last-activity for sandbox %s: %v", req.Name, err)
2579:         return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: 30 * time.Second}, err
2580:     }
2581:     
2582:     expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)
2583:     
2584:     if time.Now().After(expirationTime) {
2585:         klog.Infof("Sandbox %s has been idle for more than 15 minutes, deleting", req.Name)
2586:         
2587:         err = r.client.Delete(ctx, sandbox)
2588:         if err != nil {
2589:             if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
2590:                 klog.Infof("Sandbox %s already deleted", req.Name)
2591:                 return reconcile.Result{}, nil
2592:             }
2593:             klog.Errorf("Failed to delete sandbox %s: %v", req.Name, err)
2594:             return reconcile.Result{}, err
2595:         }
2596:         
2597:         klog.Infof("Sandbox %s deleted successfully", req.Name)
2598:         return reconcile.Result{}, nil
2599:     }
2600:     
2601:     requeueAfter := time.Until(expirationTime)
2602:     klog.Infof("Sandbox %s will expire in %v, requeueing", req.Name, requeueAfter)
2603:     return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: requeueAfter}, nil
2604: }
2605: ```
2606: 
2607: ### Logic Flow
2608: 1. Register reconciler for Sandbox CRD (agents.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1)
2609: 2. Read `agentcube.volcano.sh/last-activity` annotation
2610: 3. Skip if annotation missing or empty
2611: 4. Parse RFC3339 timestamp, requeue 30s on parse error
2612: 5. Calculate expiration (lastActivity + 15 minutes)
2613: 6. If expired: delete Sandbox CR
2614: 7. If not expired: requeue until expiration
2615: 8. Handle NotFound as success (idempotent)

2825: package picod
2826: 
2827: import (
2828:     "context"

2830:     "fmt"

2832:     "time"
2833: 
2834:     "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
2835: )
2836: 
2837: const (
2838:     DefaultTimeout   = 60 * time.Second
2839:     TimeoutExitCode = 124
2840: )
2841: 
2842: type ExecuteRequest struct {
2843:     Command     []string          `json:"command"`
2844:     Timeout     string            `json:"timeout"`
2845:     WorkingDir  string            `json:"working_dir"`
2846:     Env         map[string]string `json:"env"`
2847: }
2848: 
2849: type ExecuteResponse struct {
2850:     Stdout    string  `json:"stdout"`
2851:     Stderr    string  `json:"stderr"`
2852:     ExitCode  int     `json:"exit_code"`
2853:     Duration  float64 `json:"duration"`
2854:     StartTime string  `json:"start_time"`
2855:     EndTime   string  `json:"end_time"`
2856: }
2857: 
2858: func handleExecute(c *gin.Context) {
2859:     var req ExecuteRequest
2860:     if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
2861:         c.JSON(400, gin.H{"error": err.Error(), "code": 400})
2862:         return
2863:     }
2864:     
2865:     if len(req.Command) == 0 {
2866:         c.JSON(400, gin.H{"error": "command cannot be empty", "code": 400})
2867:         return
2868:     }
2869:     
2870:     timeout := DefaultTimeout
2871:     if req.Timeout != "" {
2872:         var err error
2873:         timeout, err = time.ParseDuration(req.Timeout)
2874:         if err != nil {
2875:             c.JSON(400, gin.H{"error": "invalid timeout format", "code": 400})
2876:             return
2877:         }
2878:     }
2879:     
2880:     workingDir := config.Workspace
2881:     if req.WorkingDir != "" {
2882:         resolved, err := sanitizePath(req.WorkingDir)
2883:         if err != nil {
2884:             c.JSON(400, gin.H{"error": "Invalid working directory: " + err.Error(), "code": 400})
2885:             return
2886:         }
2887:         workingDir = resolved
2888:     }
2889:     
2890:     ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), timeout)
2891:     defer cancel()
2892:     
2893:     cmd := exec.CommandContext(ctx, req.Command[0], req.Command[1:]...)
2894:     cmd.Dir = workingDir
2895:     
2896:     if len(req.Env) > 0 {
2897:         cmd.Env = append(os.Environ(), flattenEnv(req.Env)...)
2898:     }
2899:     
2900:     startTime := time.Now()
2901:     stdout, stderr, err := runCommand(ctx, cmd)
2902:     endTime := time.Now()
2903:     
2904:     exitCode := 0
2905:     if err != nil {
2906:         if ctx.Err() == context.DeadlineExceeded {
2907:             exitCode = TimeoutExitCode
2908:             stderr = fmt.Sprintf("Command timed out after %d seconds", int(timeout.Seconds()))
2909:         } else if exitError, ok := err.(*exec.ExitError); ok {
2910:             exitCode = exitError.ExitCode()
2911:         }
2912:     }
2913:     
2914:     c.JSON(200, ExecuteResponse{
2915:         Stdout:    stdout,
2916:         Stderr:    stderr,
2917:         ExitCode:  exitCode,
2918:         Duration:  endTime.Sub(startTime).Seconds(),
2919:         StartTime: startTime.Format(time.RFC3339),
2920:         EndTime:   endTime.Format(time.RFC3339),
2921:     })
2922: }
2923: 
2924: func runCommand(ctx context.Context, cmd *exec.Cmd) (string, string, error) {
2925:     stdout, err := cmd.StdoutPipe()
2926:     if err != nil {
2927:         return "", "", err
2928:     }
2929:     stderr, err := cmd.StderrPipe()
2930:     if err != nil {
2931:         return "", "", err
2932:     }
2933:     
2934:     if err := cmd.Start(); err != nil {
2935:         return "", "", err
2936:     }
2937:     
2938:     stdoutBytes, _ := io.ReadAll(stdout)
2939:     stderrBytes, _ := io.ReadAll(stderr)
2940:     
2941:     err = cmd.Wait()
2942:     
2943:     return string(stdoutBytes), string(stderrBytes), err
2944: }
2945: ```

3179: #### 5. `pkg/picod/auth.go`
3180: 
3181: ```go
3182: package picod
3183: 
3184: import (
3185:     "crypto/rsa"
3186:     "fmt"
3187:     "strings"
3188:     "time"
3189: 
3190:     "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
3191:     "github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
3192: )
3193: 
3194: type AuthManager struct {
3195:     publicKey *rsa.PublicKey
3196: }
3197: 
3198: func (a *AuthManager) AuthMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc {
3199:     return func(c *gin.Context) {
3200:         authHeader := c.GetHeader("Authorization")
3201:         
3202:         if authHeader == "" {
3203:             c.AbortWithStatusJSON(401, gin.H{
3204:                 "error":  "Missing authorization header",
3205:                 "code":   401,
3206:                 "detail": "Authorization header is required",
3207:             })
3208:             return
3209:         }
3210:         
3211:         parts := strings.SplitN(authHeader, " ", 2)
3212:         if len(parts) != 2 || parts[0] != "Bearer" {
3213:             c.AbortWithStatusJSON(401, gin.H{
3214:                 "error":  "Invalid authorization header",
3215:                 "code":   401,
3216:                 "detail": "Expected format: 'Bearer <token>'",
3217:             })
3218:             return
3219:         }
3220:         
3221:         tokenStr := parts[1]
3222:         
3223:         token, err := jwt.Parse(tokenStr, func(token *jwt.Token) (interface{}, error) {
3224:             if _, ok := token.Method.(*jwt.SigningMethodRSA); !ok {
3225:                 return nil, fmt.Errorf("unexpected signing method: %v", token.Header["alg"])
3226:             }
3227:             return a.publicKey, nil
3228:         }, 
3229:         jwt.WithExpirationRequired(),
3230:         jwt.WithIssuedAt(),
3231:         jwt.WithLeeway(1 * time.Minute),
3232:         )
3233:         
3234:         if err != nil || !token.Valid {
3235:             c.AbortWithStatusJSON(401, gin.H{
3236:                 "error":  "Invalid token",
3237:                 "code":   401,
3238:                 "detail": err.Error(),
3239:             })
3240:             return
3241:         }
3242:         
3243:         c.Next()
3244:     }
3245: }
3246: 
3247: func handleHealth(c *gin.Context) {
3248:     c.JSON(200, gin.H{
3249:         "status":  "ok",
3250:         "service": "PicoD",
3251:         "version": "0.0.1",
3252:         "uptime":  time.Since(startTime).String(),
3253:     })
3254: }
3255: 
3256: func sanitizePath(requestedPath string) (string, error) {
3257:     workspace := config.Workspace
3258:     if workspace == "" {
3259:         return "", fmt.Errorf("workspace not configured")
3260:     }
3261:     
3262:     clean := filepath.Clean(filepath.Join("/", requestedPath))
3263:     if clean == ".." || strings.HasPrefix(clean, "..") {
3264:         return "", fmt.Errorf("path escapes workspace")
3265:     }
3266:     
3267:     fullPath := filepath.Join(workspace, clean)
3268:     
3269:     if !strings.HasPrefix(fullPath, workspace) {
3270:         return "", fmt.Errorf("path escapes workspace")
3271:     }
3272:     
3273:     return fullPath, nil
3274: }
3275: 
3276: func parseFileMode(modeStr string, defaultMode os.FileMode) (os.FileMode, error) {
3277:     if modeStr == "" {
3278:         return defaultMode, nil
3279:     }
3280:     
3281:     var mode os.FileMode
3282:     _, err := fmt.Sscanf(modeStr, "%o", &mode)
3283:     if err != nil {
3284:         return defaultMode, fmt.Errorf("invalid mode: %s", modeStr)
3285:     }
3286:     
3287:     const maxMode = 07777
3288:     if mode > maxMode {
3289:         return defaultMode, fmt.Errorf("mode exceeds maximum: %o", maxMode)
3290:     }
3291:     
3292:     return mode, nil
3293: }
3294: 
3295: func flattenEnv(env map[string]string) []string {
3296:     result := make([]string, 0, len(env))
3297:     for k, v := range env {
3298:         result = append(result, k+"="+v)
3299:     }
3300:     return result
3301: }
3302: ```
3303: 
3304: ### Logic Flow
3305: 1. **Execute API**: POST /api/execute with command JSON
3306:    - Validate command not empty
3307:    - Parse timeout (default 60s)
3308:    - Resolve working directory with path safety
3309:    - Augment environment variables
3310:    - Run via exec.CommandContext
3311:    - Return stdout, stderr, exit_code, duration
3312:    - Handle timeout with exit code 124
3313: 
3314: 2. **File upload**: POST /api/files
3315:    - Multipart: read path, file, mode
3316:    - JSON: read path, content (Base64)
3317:    - Create directories (0755), write file with mode
3318:    - Return FileInfo
3319: 
3320: 3. **File listing**: GET /api/files?path=...
3321:    - Require path query param
3322:    - Read directory, return file entries
3323: 
3324: 4. **File download**: GET /api/files/*path
3325:    - Sanitize path, verify within workspace
3326:    - Set download headers
3327:    - Stream file
3328: 
3329: 5. **Health**: GET /health (no auth)
3330:    - Return status, service, version, uptime
3331: 
3332: 6. **JWT auth**: All /api/* routes require Bearer token
3333:    - Parse RSA-signed JWT
3334:    - Validate with public key from PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY
3335: 
3336: 7. **Server config**: CLI flags -port, -workspace
3337:    - Default port 8080, workspace CWD
3338:    - ReadHeaderTimeout 10s

package store

import (
	"context"
	"time"

	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
)

type Store interface {
	Ping(ctx context.Context) error
	GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
	StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error
	UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error
	DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
	ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int) ([]string, error)
	ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int) ([]string, error)
	UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
	Close() error
}

<path>/home/dsj/benchmark/workspaces/v3.0/opencode-cli_bailian-coding-plan_MiniMax-M2.5_20260324T141235Z/pkg/store/redis/redis.go</path>

<content>1: package redis
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"encoding/json"
6: 	"fmt"
7: 	"time"
8: 
9: 	"github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
10: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
11: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store"
12: )
13: 
14: type RedisStore struct {
15: 	client           *redis.Client
16: 	expiryZSet       string
17: 	lastActivityZSet string
18: 	sessionPrefix    string
19: }
20: 
21: func NewRedisStore(addr, password string) (*RedisStore, error) {
22: 	client := redis.NewClient(&redis.Options{
23: 		Addr:     addr,
24: 		Password: password,
25: 		DB:       0,
26: 	})
27: 
28: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 5*time.Second)
29: 	defer cancel()
30: 
31: 	if err := client.Ping(ctx).Err(); err != nil {
32: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to connect to redis: %w", err)
33: 	}
34: 
35: 	return &RedisStore{
36: 		client:           client,
37: 		expiryZSet:       "session:expiry",
38: 		lastActivityZSet: "session:last_activity",
39: 		sessionPrefix:    "session:",
40: 	}, nil
41: }
42: 
43: func (r *RedisStore) Ping(ctx context.Context) error {
44: 	return r.client.Ping(ctx).Err()
45: }
46: 
47: func (r *RedisStore) GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
48: 	key := r.sessionPrefix + sessionID
49: 	data, err := r.client.Get(ctx, key).Bytes()
50: 	if err != nil {
51: 		if err == redis.Nil {
52: 			return nil, store.ErrNotFound
53: 		}
54: 		return nil, err
55: 	}
56: 
57: 	var sandbox types.SandboxInfo
58: 	if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &sandbox); err != nil {
59: 		return nil, err
60: 	}
61: 
62: 	return &sandbox, nil
63: }
64: 
65: func (r *RedisStore) StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error {
66: 	key := r.sessionPrefix + sandbox.SessionID
67: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandbox)
68: 	if err != nil {
69: 		return err
70: 	}
71: 
72: 	expiryTime := sandbox.CreatedAt.Add(24 * time.Hour)
73: 	pipe := r.client.Pipeline()
74: 	pipe.SetNX(ctx, key, data, 24*time.Hour)
75: 	pipe.ZAdd(ctx, r.expiryZSet, redis.Z{Score: float64(expiryTime.Unix()), Member: sandbox.SessionID})
76: 	pipe.ZAdd(ctx, r.lastActivityZSet, redis.Z{Score: float64(sandbox.LastActivity.Unix()), Member: sandbox.SessionID})
77: 
78: 	_, err = pipe.Exec(ctx)
79: 	return err
80: }
81: 
82: func (r *RedisStore) UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error {
83: 	key := r.sessionPrefix + sandbox.SessionID
84: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandbox)
85: 	if err != nil {
86: 		return err
87: 	}
88: 
89: 	result, err := r.client.Set(ctx, key, data, 24*time.Hour).Result()
90: 	if result == "OK" {
91: 		return nil
92: 	}
93: 	return err
94: }
95: 
96: func (r *RedisStore) DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
97: 	key := r.sessionPrefix + sessionID
98: 	pipe := r.client.Pipeline()
99: 	pipe.Del(ctx, key)
100: 	pipe.ZRem(ctx, r.expiryZSet, sessionID)
101: 	pipe.ZRem(ctx, r.lastActivityZSet, sessionID)
102: 
103: 	_, err := pipe.Exec(ctx)
104: 	return err
105: }
106: 
107: func (r *RedisStore) ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
108: 	members, err := r.client.ZRangeByScore(ctx, r.expiryZSet, &redis.ZRangeBy{
109: 		Min:   "0",
110: 		Max:   fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix()),
111: 		Count: limit,
112: 	}).Result()
113: 	if err != nil {
114: 		return nil, err
115: 	}
116: 
117: 	return r.getSandboxesByIDs(ctx, members)
118: }
119: 
120: func (r *RedisStore) ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {

2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"encoding/json"

8: 
9: 	"github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go"

11: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store"
12: )
13: 
14: type ValkeyStore struct {
15: 	client           valkey.Client
16: 	expiryZSet       string
17: 	lastActivityZSet string
18: 	sessionPrefix    string
19: }
20: 
21: func NewValkeyStore(addr, password string) (*ValkeyStore, error) {
22: 	client, err := valkey.NewClient(valkey.ClientOption{
23: 		InitAddress: []string{addr},
24: 		Password:    password,
25: 	})
26: 	if err != nil {
27: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to connect to valkey: %w", err)
28: 	}
29: 
30: 	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 5*time.Second)
31: 	defer cancel()
32: 
33: 	if err := client.Ping(ctx).Err(); err != nil {
34: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to ping valkey: %w", err)
35: 	}
36: 
37: 	return &ValkeyStore{
38: 		client:           client,
39: 		expiryZSet:       "session:expiry",
40: 		lastActivityZSet: "session:last_activity",
41: 		sessionPrefix:    "session:",
42: 	}, nil
43: }
44: 
45: func (v *ValkeyStore) Ping(ctx context.Context) error {
46: 	return v.client.Ping(ctx).Err()
47: }
48: 
49: func (v *ValkeyStore) GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
50: 	key := v.sessionPrefix + sessionID
51: 	data, err := v.client.Get(ctx, key).Bytes()
52: 	if err != nil {
53: 		if err == valkey.Nil {
54: 			return nil, store.ErrNotFound
55: 		}
56: 		return nil, err
57: 	}
58: 
59: 	var sandbox types.SandboxInfo
60: 	if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &sandbox); err != nil {
61: 		return nil, err
62: 	}
63: 
64: 	return &sandbox, nil
65: }
66: 
67: func (v *ValkeyStore) StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error {
68: 	key := v.sessionPrefix + sandbox.SessionID
69: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandbox)
70: 	if err != nil {
71: 		return err
72: 	}
73: 
74: 	expiryTime := sandbox.CreatedAt.Add(24 * time.Hour)
75: 	pipe := v.client.Pipeline()
76: 	pipe.SetNX(ctx, key, data, 24*time.Hour)
77: 	pipe.ZAdd(ctx, v.expiryZSet, valkey.Z{Score: float64(expiryTime.Unix()), Member: sandbox.SessionID})
78: 	pipe.ZAdd(ctx, v.lastActivityZSet, valkey.Z{Score: float64(sandbox.LastActivity.Unix()), Member: sandbox.SessionID})
79: 
80: 	_, err = pipe.Exec(ctx)
81: 	return err
82: }
83: 
84: func (v *ValkeyStore) UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error {
85: 	key := v.sessionPrefix + sandbox.SessionID
86: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandbox)
87: 	if err != nil {
88: 		return err
89: 	}
90: 
91: 	result, err := v.client.Set(ctx, key, data, 24*time.Hour).Result()
92: 	if result == "OK" {
93: 		return nil
94: 	}
95: 	return err
96: }
97: 
98: func (v *ValkeyStore) DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
99: 	key := v.sessionPrefix + sessionID
100: 	pipe := v.client.Pipeline()
101: 	pipe.Del(ctx, key)
102: 	pipe.ZRem(ctx, v.expiryZSet, sessionID)
103: 	pipe.ZRem(ctx, v.lastActivityZSet, sessionID)
104: 
105: 	_, err := pipe.Exec(ctx)
106: 	return err
107: }
108: 
109: func (v *ValkeyStore) ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
110: 	members, err := v.client.ZRangeByScore(ctx, v.expiryZSet, valkey.ZRangeBy{
111: 		Min:   "0",
112: 		Max:   fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix()),
113: 		Count: limit,
114: 	}).Result()
115: 	if err != nil {
116: 		return nil, err
117: 	}
118: 
119: 	return v.getSandboxesByIDs(ctx, members)
120: }
121: 
122: func (v *ValkeyStore) ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
123: 	members, err := v.client.ZRangeByScore(ctx, v.lastActivityZSet, valkey.ZRangeBy{
124: 		Min:   "0",
125: 		Max:   fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix()),
126: 		Count: limit,
127: 	}).Result()
128: 	if err != nil {
129: 		return nil, err
130: 	}
131: 
132: 	return v.getSandboxesByIDs(ctx, members)
133: }
134: 
135: func (v *ValkeyStore) getSandboxesByIDs(ctx context.Context, sessionIDs []string) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
136: 	var sandboxes []*types.SandboxInfo
137: 	for _, id := range sessionIDs {
138: 		sandbox, err := v.GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, id)
139: 		if err != nil {
140: 			if err == store.ErrNotFound {

142: 			}
143: 			return nil, err

145: 		sandboxes = append(sandboxes, sandbox)
146: 	}
147: 	return sandboxes, nil
148: }

151: 	return v.client.ZAdd(ctx, v.lastActivityZSet, valkey.Z{

2:

4: 	"fmt"
5: 	"os"

7: 
8: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store/redis"

10: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
11: )
12: 
13: var (
14: 	storeInstance Store
15: 	storeOnce     sync.Once
16: 	storeErr      error
17: )
18: 
19: func Storage() Store {
20: 	storeOnce.Do(func() {
21: 		storeType := getEnv("STORE_TYPE", "redis")
22: 
23: 		switch storeType {
24: 		case "redis":
25: 			storeInstance, storeErr = newRedisStore()
26: 		case "valkey":
27: 			storeInstance, storeErr = newValkeyStore()
28: 		default:
29: 			storeErr = fmt.Errorf("unsupported store type: %s (supported: redis, valkey)", storeType)
30: 		}
31: 
32: 		if storeErr != nil {
33: 			klog.Fatal(storeErr)
34: 		}
35: 	})
36: 
37: 	return storeInstance
38: }
39: 
40: func newRedisStore() (Store, error) {
41: 	addr := getEnv("REDIS_ADDR", "")
42: 	password := getEnv("REDIS_PASSWORD", "")
43: 	passwordRequired := getEnv("REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED", "true") == "true"
44: 
45: 	if addr == "" {
46: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("REDIS_ADDR is required")
47: 	}
48: 
49: 	if passwordRequired && password == "" {
50: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("REDIS_PASSWORD is required when REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED is true")
51: 	}
52: 
53: 	return redis.NewRedisStore(addr, password)
54: }
55: 
56: func newValkeyStore() (Store, error) {
57: 	addr := getEnv("VALKEY_ADDR", "")
58: 	password := getEnv("VALKEY_PASSWORD", "")
59: 	passwordRequired := getEnv("VALKEY_PASSWORD_REQUIRED", "true") == "true"
60: 
61: 	if addr == "" {
62: 		addr = getEnv("REDIS_ADDR", "")
63: 	}
64: 
65: 	if addr == "" {
66: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("VALKEY_ADDR (or REDIS_ADDR) is required")
67: 	}
68: 
69: 	if passwordRequired && password == "" {
70: 		password = getEnv("REDIS_PASSWORD", "")
71: 	}
72: 
73: 	if passwordRequired && password == "" {
74: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("VALKEY_PASSWORD (or REDIS_PASSWORD) is required when VALKEY_PASSWORD_REQUIRED is true")
75: 	}
76: 
77: 	return valkey.NewValkeyStore(addr, password)
78: }
79: 
80: func getEnv(key, defaultValue string) string {
81: 	if value := os.Getenv(key); value != "" {
82: 		return value
83: 	}
84: 	return defaultValue
85: }

14: type manager struct {

18: }
19: 
20: func NewSessionManager(storeClient store.Store) (SessionManager, error) {
21: 	workloadMgrAddr := getWorkloadMgrURL()
22: 	if workloadMgrAddr == "" {
23: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL is required")
24: 	}
25: 
26: 	httpClient := &http.Client{
27: 		Timeout: 2 * time.Minute,
28: 	}
29: 
30: 	return &manager{
31: 		storeClient:     storeClient,
32: 		workloadMgrAddr: workloadMgrAddr,
33: 		httpClient:      httpClient,
34: 	}, nil
35: }
36: 
37: func getWorkloadMgrURL() string {
38: 	return ""
39: }
40:

42: 	return m.storeClient.GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)
43: }
44: 
45: func (m *manager) CreateSession(ctx context.Context, namespace, name, kind string) (*types.CreateSandboxResponse, error) {
46: 	url := fmt.Sprintf("%s/v1/%s", m.workloadMgrAddr, getKindEndpoint(kind))
47: 
48: 	reqBody := map[string]string{
49: 		"namespace": namespace,
50: 		"name":      name,
51: 	}
52: 	_, _ = json.Marshal(reqBody)
53: 
54: 	req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, "POST", url, nil)
55: 	if err != nil {
56: 		return nil, err
57: 	}
58: 
59: 	resp, err := m.httpClient.Do(req)
60: 	if err != nil {
61: 		return nil, err
62: 	}
63: 	defer resp.Body.Close()
64: 
65: 	if resp.StatusCode != http.StatusCreated {
66: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create session: %d", resp.StatusCode)
67: 	}
68: 
69: 	var result types.CreateSandboxResponse
70: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&result); err != nil {
71: 		return nil, err
72: 	}
73: 
74: 	return &result, nil
75: }
76: 
77: func (m *manager) DeleteSession(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
78: 	url := fmt.Sprintf("%s/v1/sandbox/%s", m.workloadMgrAddr, sessionID)
79: 
80: 	req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, "DELETE", url, nil)
81: 	if err != nil {
82: 		return err
83: 	}
84: 
85: 	_, err = m.httpClient.Do(req)
86: 	if err != nil {
87: 		return err
88: 	}
89: 
90: 	return m.storeClient.DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)
91: }
92: 
93: func (m *manager) UpdateLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
94: 	return m.storeClient.UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx, sessionID, time.Now())
95: }
96: 
97: func getKindEndpoint(kind string) string {
98: 	switch kind {
99: 	case "AgentRuntime":
100: 		return "agent-runtime"
101: 	case "CodeInterpreter":
102: 		return "code-interpreter"
103: 	default:
104: 		return "agent-runtime"
105: 	}
106: }

<content>1: package main
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"flag"
5: 	"time"
6: 
7: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/idlecleanup"
8: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"
9: 	"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
10: 	clientgoscheme "k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/scheme"
11: 	_ "k8s.io/client-go/plugin/pkg/client/auth"
12: 	"k8s.io/client-go/rest"
13: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
14: 	ctrl "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime"
15: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client/config"
16: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/healthz"
17: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/manager"
18: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/metrics/server"
19: 
20: 	sandboxv1alpha1 "github.com/volcano-sh/agent-sandbox/api/v1alpha1"
21: )
22: 
23: var (
24: 	scheme = runtime.NewScheme()
25: )
26: 
27: func init() {
28: 	_ = clientgoscheme.AddToScheme(scheme)
29: 	_ = sandboxv1alpha1.AddToScheme(scheme)
30: }
31: 
32: func main() {
33: 	klog.InitFlags(flag.CommandLine)
34: 	flag.Parse()
35: 
36: 	namespace := flag.String("namespace", "", "Namespace to watch for idle sandboxes")
37: 	expirationTimeout := flag.Duration("expiration-timeout", 15*time.Minute, "Timeout before idle sandbox is cleaned up")
38: 	healthProbeAddr := flag.String("health-probe-bind-address", ":8081", "The address the healthz probe binds to")
39: 	metricsAddr := flag.String("metrics-bind-address", ":8082", "The address the metrics endpoint binds to")
40: 	syncInterval := flag.Duration("sync-interval", 1*time.Minute, "Interval between reconciliation cycles")
41: 
42: 	cfg, err := config.GetConfigOrDie()
43: 	if err != nil {
44: 		klog.Exitf("Failed to get kubeconfig: %v", err)
45: 	}
46: 
47: 	restConfig := &rest.Config{
48: 		Host: cfg.Host,
49: 	}
50: 	*restConfig = *cfg
51: 
52: 	mgr, err := manager.New(restConfig, manager.Options{
53: 		Scheme: scheme,
54: 		Metrics: server.Options{
55: 			BindAddress: *metricsAddr,
56: 		},
57: 		HealthProbeBindAddress: *healthProbeAddr,
58: 	})
59: 	if err != nil {
60: 		klog.Exitf("Failed to create manager: %v", err)
61: 	}
62: 
63: 	kubeClient, err := kubernetes.NewForConfig(restConfig)
64: 	if err != nil {
65: 		klog.Exitf("Failed to create kubernetes client: %v", err)
66: 	}
67: 
68: 	reconciler := idlecleanup.NewReconciler(
69: 		kubeClient,
70: 		*namespace,
71: 		*expirationTimeout,
72: 		*syncInterval,
73: 	)
74: 
75: 	if err := reconciler.SetupWithManager(mgr); err != nil {
76: 		klog.Exitf("Failed to setup reconciler: %v", err)
77: 	}
78: 
79: 	if err := mgr.AddHealthzCheck("health", healthz.Ping); err != nil {
80: 		klog.Exitf("Failed to add healthz check: %v", err)
81: 	}
82: 
83: 	if err := mgr.AddReadyzCheck("ready", healthz.Ping); err != nil {
84: 		klog.Exitf("Failed to add readyz check: %v", err)
85: 	}
86: 
87: 	klog.Info("Starting agentd idle cleanup controller")
88: 	if err := mgr.Start(ctrl.SetupSignalHandler()); err != nil {
89: 		klog.Exitf("Failed to start manager: %v", err)
90: 	}
91: }

3: import (

8: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"
9: 	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
10: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/labels"
11: 	"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
12: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
13: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client"
14: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/controller"
15: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/event"
16: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/handler"
17: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/log"
18: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/manager"
19: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/predicate"
20: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/reconcile"
21: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/source"
22: 
23: 	sandboxv1alpha1 "github.com/volcano-sh/agent-sandbox/api/v1alpha1"
24: )
25: 
26: const (
27: 	LastActivityAnnotationKey = "last-activity-time"
28: 	SessionExpirationTimeout  = 15 * time.Minute
29: )
30: 
31: var (
32: 	log_ = log.Log.WithName("idlecleanup")
33: )
34: 
35: type Reconciler struct {
36: 	kubeClient        kubernetes.Interface
37: 	client            client.Client
38: 	namespace         string
39: 	expirationTimeout time.Duration
40: 	syncInterval      time.Duration
41: }
42: 
43: func NewReconciler(kubeClient kubernetes.Interface, namespace string, expirationTimeout, syncInterval time.Duration) *Reconciler {
44: 	return &Reconciler{
45: 		kubeClient:        kubeClient,
46: 		namespace:         namespace,
47: 		expirationTimeout: expirationTimeout,
48: 		syncInterval:      syncInterval,
49: 	}
50: }
51: 
52: func (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr manager.Manager) error {
53: 	r.client = mgr.GetClient()
54: 
55: 	_, err := controller.New("idlecleanup-controller", mgr, controller.Options{
56: 		Reconciler: r,
57: 	})
58: 	if err != nil {
59: 		return err
60: 	}
61: 
62: 	src := source.NewKindWithCache(&sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}, mgr.GetCache())
63: 	hdler := handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(r.enqueueRequests)
64: 
65: 	pred := predicate.Funcs{
66: 		CreateFunc:  func(e event.CreateEvent) bool { return true },
67: 		DeleteFunc:  func(e event.DeleteEvent) bool { return true },
68: 		UpdateFunc:  func(e event.UpdateEvent) bool { return true },
69: 		GenericFunc: func(e event.GenericEvent) bool { return true },
70: 	}
71: 
72: 	if err := mgr.GetCache().IndexField(context.Background(), &sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}, ".spec.state", r.indexStateField); err != nil {
73: 		return err
74: 	}
75: 
76: 	return mgr.Add(controller.New("idlecleanup-controller", mgr, controller.Options{
77: 		Reconciler: r,
78: 	}))
79: }
80: 
81: func (r *Reconciler) indexStateField(o client.Object) []string {
82: 	sb := o.(*sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox)
83: 	return []string{sb.Spec.State}
84: }
85: 
86: func (r *Reconciler) enqueueRequests(_ context.Context, o handler.MapObject) []reconcile.Request {
87: 	return []reconcile.Request{
88: 		{
89: 			NamespacedName: client.ObjectKeyFromObject(o.Object),
90: 		},
91: 	}
92: }
93: 
94: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req reconcile.Request) (reconcile.Result, error) {
95: 	startTime := time.Now()
96: 	defer func() {
97: 		duration := time.Since(startTime)
98: 		klog.V(4).Infof("Reconciliation completed in %v", duration)
99: 	}()
100: 
101: 	namespace := req.Namespace
102: 	if r.namespace != "" {
103: 		namespace = r.namespace
104: 	}
105: 
106: 	sandbox := &sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}
107: 	err := r.client.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox)
108: 	if err != nil {
109: 		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
110: 			klog.V(4).Infof("Sandbox %s not found, skipping", req.NamespacedName)
111: 			return reconcile.Result{}, nil
112: 		}
113: 		klog.Errorf("Failed to get Sandbox %s: %v", req.NamespacedName, err)
114: 		return reconcile.Result{}, err
115: 	}
116: 
117: 	lastActivityStr, ok := sandbox.Annotations[LastActivityAnnotationKey]
118: 	if !ok {
119: 		klog.V(4).Infof("Sandbox %s has no last-activity-time annotation, skipping", req.NamespacedName)
120: 		return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: r.syncInterval}, nil
121: 	}
122: 
123: 	lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
124: 	if err != nil {
125: 		klog.Errorf("Failed to parse last-activity-time for Sandbox %s: %v", req.NamespacedName, err)
126: 		return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: r.syncInterval}, nil
127: 	}
128: 
129: 	expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(r.expirationTimeout)
130: 	now := time.Now()
131: 
132: 	if now.After(expirationTime) {
133: 		klog.Infof("Deleting expired Sandbox %s (last activity: %v, expiration: %v)",
134: 			req.NamespacedName, lastActivity, expirationTime)
135: 
136: 		policy := client.DeletePropagationForeground
137: 		if err := r.client.Delete(ctx, sandbox, &client.DeleteOptions{PropagationPolicy: &policy}); err != nil {
138: 			if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
139: 				klog.V(4).Infof("Sandbox %s already deleted", req.NamespacedName)
140: 				return reconcile.Result{}, nil
141: 			}
142: 			klog.Errorf("Failed to delete Sandbox %s: %v", req.NamespacedName, err)
143: 			return reconcile.Result{}, err
144: 		}
145: 
146: 		klog.Infof("Successfully deleted expired Sandbox %s", req.NamespacedName)
147: 		return reconcile.Result{}, nil
148: 	}
149: 
150: 	requeueTime := expirationTime.Sub(now)
151: 	if requeueTime < time.Second {
152: 		requeueTime = time.Second
153: 	}
154: 
155: 	klog.V(4).Infof("Sandbox %s not yet expired (expires in %v)", req.NamespacedName, requeueTime)
156: 	return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: requeueTime}, nil
157: }
158: 
159: func (r *Reconciler) ReconcileExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context) error {
160: 	namespace := r.namespace
161: 	if namespace == "" {
162: 		namespace = metav1.NamespaceAll
163: 	}
164: 
165: 	listOpts := &client.ListOptions{
166: 		Namespace:     namespace,
167: 		LabelSelector: labels.Everything(),
168: 	}
169: 
170: 	sandboxList := &sandboxv1alpha1.SandboxList{}
171: 	if err := r.client.List(ctx, sandboxList, listOpts); err != nil {
172: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to list sandboxes: %w", err)
173: 	}
174: 
175: 	now := time.Now()
176: 	deletedCount := 0
177: 
178: 	for i := range sandboxList.Items {
179: 		sb := &sandboxList.Items[i]
180: 
181: 		lastActivityStr, ok := sb.Annotations[LastActivityAnnotationKey]
182: 		if !ok {
183: 			continue
184: 		}
185: 
186: 		lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
187: 		if err != nil {
188: 			continue
189: 		}
190: 
191: 		expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(r.expirationTimeout)
192: 		if now.After(expirationTime) {
193: 			klog.Infof("Cleaning up expired sandbox %s/%s", sb.Namespace, sb.Name)
194: 
195: 			policy := client.DeletePropagationForeground
196: 			if err := r.client.Delete(ctx, sb, &client.DeleteOptions{PropagationPolicy: &policy}); err != nil {
197: 				if !errors.IsNotFound(err) {
198: 					klog.Errorf("Failed to delete sandbox %s/%s: %v", sb.Namespace, sb.Name, err)
199: 				}
200: 				continue
201: 			}
202: 			deletedCount++
203: 		}
204: 	}
205: 
206: 	klog.V(2).Infof("Cleaned up %d expired sandboxes in namespace %s", deletedCount, namespace)
207: 	return nil
208: }

<content>1: package router
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"crypto/rand"
5: 	"crypto/rsa"
6: 	"crypto/x509"
7: 	"encoding/pem"
8: 	"fmt"
9: 	"time"
10: 
11: 	"github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
12: )
13: 
14: type JWTManager struct {
15: 	privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey
16: 	publicKey  *rsa.PublicKey
17: 	secretName string
18: }
19: 
20: type JWTClaims struct {
21: 	SessionID string `json:"session_id"`
22: 	Kind      string `json:"kind"`
23: 	jwt.RegisteredClaims
24: }
25: 
26: func NewJWTManager() (*JWTManager, error) {
27: 	privateKey, err := rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
28: 	if err != nil {
29: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to generate RSA key: %w", err)
30: 	}
31: 
32: 	return &JWTManager{
33: 		privateKey: privateKey,
34: 		publicKey:  &privateKey.PublicKey,
35: 		secretName: "picod-router-identity",
36: 	}, nil
37: }
38: 
39: func (m *JWTManager) GenerateToken(sessionID, kind string) (string, error) {
40: 	claims := JWTClaims{
41: 		SessionID: sessionID,
42: 		Kind:      kind,
43: 		RegisteredClaims: jwt.RegisteredClaims{
44: 			ExpiresAt: jwt.NewNumericDate(time.Now().Add(5 * time.Minute)),
45: 			IssuedAt:  jwt.NewNumericDate(time.Now()),
46: 		},
47: 	}
48: 
49: 	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, claims)
50: 	return token.SignedString(m.privateKey)
51: }
52: 
53: func (m *JWTManager) ValidateToken(tokenString string) (*JWTClaims, error) {
54: 	token, err := jwt.ParseWithClaims(tokenString, &JWTClaims{}, func(token *jwt.Token) (interface{}, error) {
55: 		if _, ok := token.Method.(*jwt.SigningMethodRSA); !ok {
56: 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("unexpected signing method: %v", token.Header["alg"])
57: 		}
58: 		return m.publicKey, nil
59: 	})
60: 
61: 	if err != nil {
62: 		return nil, err
63: 	}
64: 
65: 	if claims, ok := token.Claims.(*JWTClaims); ok && token.Valid {
66: 		return claims, nil
67: 	}
68: 
69: 	return nil, fmt.Errorf("invalid token")
70: }
71: 
72: func (m *JWTManager) GetPublicKey() string {
73: 	return m.publicKeyForStorage()
74: }
75: 
76: func (m *JWTManager) publicKeyForStorage() string {
77: 	pubASN1, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(m.publicKey)
78: 	if err != nil {
79: 		return ""
80: 	}
81: 
82: 	pubBytes := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
83: 		Type:  "RSA PUBLIC KEY",
84: 		Bytes: pubASN1,
85: 	})
86: 
87: 	return string(pubBytes)
88: }
89: 
90: func (m *JWTManager) TryStoreOrLoadJWTKeySecret() error {
91: 	return nil
92: }

35: }

37: func getWorkloadMgrURL() string {
38: 	return ""
39: }
40: 
41: func (m *manager) GetSession(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
42: 	return m.storeClient.GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)
43: }
44: 
45: func (m *manager) CreateSession(ctx context.Context, namespace, name, kind string) (*types.CreateSandboxResponse, error) {
46: 	url := fmt.Sprintf("%s/v1/%s", m.workloadMgrAddr, getKindEndpoint(kind))
47: 
48: 	reqBody := map[string]string{
49: 		"namespace": namespace,
50: 		"name":      name,
51: 	}
52: 	_, _ = json.Marshal(reqBody)
53: 
54: 	req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, "POST", url, nil)
55: 	if err != nil {
56: 		return nil, err
57: 	}
58: 
59: 	resp, err := m.httpClient.Do(req)
60: 	if err != nil {
61: 		return nil, err
62: 	}
63: 	defer resp.Body.Close()
64: 
65: 	if resp.StatusCode != http.StatusCreated {
66: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create session: %d", resp.StatusCode)
67: 	}
68: 
69: 	var result types.CreateSandboxResponse
70: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(resp.Body).Decode(&result); err != nil {
71: 		return nil, err
72: 	}
73: 
74: 	return &result, nil
75: }
76: 
77: func (m *manager) DeleteSession(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
78: 	url := fmt.Sprintf("%s/v1/sandbox/%s", m.workloadMgrAddr, sessionID)
79: 
80: 	req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, "DELETE", url, nil)
81: 	if err != nil {
82: 		return err
83: 	}
84: 
85: 	_, err = m.httpClient.Do(req)
86: 	if err != nil {
87: 		return err
88: 	}
89: 
90: 	return m.storeClient.DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID)
91: }
92: 
93: func (m *manager) UpdateLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
94: 	return m.storeClient.UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx, sessionID, time.Now())
95: }
96: 
97: func getKindEndpoint(kind string) string {
98: 	switch kind {
99: 	case "AgentRuntime":
100: 		return "agent-runtime"
101: 	case "CodeInterpreter":
102: 		return "code-interpreter"
103: 	default:
104: 		return "agent-runtime"
105: 	}
106: }
